steps.title: Gather the source material
steps.detail: Start with the real inputs for turning a blog post into a short Instagram carousel: notes, files, transcript text, product facts, or examples. The output will only be useful if the source is specific.

steps.title: Ask for the first useful draft
steps.detail: Use Canva Magic Studio to create the first pass from that source material. Ask for a practical result, not a generic explanation of the topic.

steps.title: Check the draft against the original
steps.detail: Compare names, facts, dates, claims, missing context, and tone against the original input before you edit style or formatting.

steps.title: Change format only after the facts are right
steps.detail: Use Adobe Firefly when the result needs a visual, social, presentation, or alternate format. Keep the same source facts so the rewrite does not drift.

steps.title: Polish the final version
steps.detail: Use Predis.ai or a manual review pass to tighten wording, remove filler, and make the final result easier to read on a phone or computer.

faqs.question: Can I use AI to rewrite turning a blog post into a short Instagram carousel without changing the meaning?
faqs.answer: Yes, but you need to keep the original message in view. Canva Magic Studio is the best first pass when you want careful wording, Adobe Firefly is useful when you need a different rewrite style, and Predis.ai is the fallback for a final polish.

faqs.question: Which AI tool is better for tone and clarity?
faqs.answer: Canva Magic Studio is usually the safest place to start when you want cleaner tone without losing intent. Adobe Firefly becomes more useful when you need a more opinionated rewrite.

faqs.question: Is Canva Magic Studio better than Adobe Firefly for client emails?
faqs.answer: Canva Magic Studio is better when accuracy and tone control matter more than speed; Adobe Firefly is the better fallback when you want a wider rewrite or a second opinion on wording.

faqs.question: What should I avoid before I send the final version?
faqs.answer: Do not send the rewritten text until you have checked the meaning, names, dates, and asks. That matters even more when you use Predis.ai for the final edit.
